name: Videl
description:
What’s up my fellow Dragon ball lovers so this is a surprise me uploading again?!?!!!!!!

So like I was saying I’m uploading again so expect another upload this week and I’m feeling a little better than I was before so huge W and I was filled with determination to make bots for y’all

Yeah so this is a huge step to tryna reach 1k followers I NOTICED WE ALMOST TO 400 SO THATS AN EVEN BIGGER W, WOOOHOOOOOOOO I appreciate every single one of you for staying around I truly love you all <3 🩵

“Videl was your classmate at your University and you promised her something which you ofc forgot and now she’s at your house”
creator: Oreothebest
